name: ANCHOR
tagline: Order management platform rebuilt from legacy to 99.99% uptime

starry.situation: A top-10 global beverage company faced infrastructure risk in Japan due to legacy systems with single points of failure, threatening tens of millions in revenue. The goal was to de-risk operations and enable safe software deployment.
starry.task: Remove risk with minimal disruption. Ensure minute-level recovery, modernize hardware, and stay within cost and effort constraints.
starry.action: Audited systems and implemented backups. Built a virtualized environment for testing and rapid provisioning. Streamlined installs, added monitoring, and deployed a user-friendly hypervisor and backup suite to support recovery and staging.
starry.result: Reliability improved to 99.7%. Builds dropped to 1.5 hours, restores to 5 minutes. Processing sped up 3x. Local teams gained performance and readiness for future cloud migration.
starry.return: Protected $4M/year in revenue. Saved 900+ hours annually. Improved client experience and enabled staff to focus on business growth.
starry.yield: Enabled strategic flexibility and long-term planning. Virtualization and modernization formed a repeatable model for secure, scalable transformation.
